title: Apple AI Siri And Bill Splitting Debut Test Long Term Services Story
sentences: Apple AI Siri And Bill Splitting Debut Test Long Term Services Story Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) is expected to introduce a rebuilt AI powered Siri, co developed with Google Gemini, at WWDC 2026.
The AI Siri launch is described by many investors and analysts as a key moment for Apple's artificial intelligence positioning and product strategy.
Apple is also preparing an iPhone bill splitting feature that embeds peer to peer payments directly into iOS, targeting usage similar to Venmo and Splitwise.
Both initiatives are designed to deepen user engagement in the Apple...

Apple is also preparing an iPhone bill splitting feature that embeds peer to peer payments directly into iOS, targeting usage similar to Venmo and Splitwise.
